tech_news.title: Apple’s Foldable iPhone to Feature iPad-Like Interface When Opened - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Apple Inc.’s forthcoming foldable iPhone will include updates to the iOS operating system that enable iPad-like layouts and side-by-side apps for the first time, enhancing the device’s appeal for multitasking.
